---
title: "FOD Rugby CMJ/IMTP Analysis"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    theme: readable
    code_folding: hide
    df_print: paged
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE)

library(readxl)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(stringr)
library(ggplot2)
library(nlme)
library(emmeans)
library(broom.mixed)
library(gtsummary)
library(patchwork)
library(sjPlot)

# Simple, consistent name cleaning for easier programming
clean_names <- function(df) {
  nms <- names(df)
  nms <- tolower(nms)
  nms <- gsub("\\[|\\]", "", nms)
  nms <- gsub("\\(|\\)", "", nms)
  nms <- gsub("%", "pct", nms)
  nms <- gsub("[^a-z0-9]+", "_", nms)
  nms <- gsub("^_+|_+$", "", nms)
  names(df) <- nms
  df
}

# Collapse to 1 row per athlete-week (mean of numeric cols)
collapse_by_id_week <- function(df, id_col = "external_id") {
  num_cols <- names(df)[sapply(df, is.numeric)]
  num_cols <- setdiff(num_cols, c("week_num"))
  df %>%
    group_by(.data[[id_col]], week_num, week_f) %>%
    summarise(
      across(all_of(num_cols), ~ mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE)),
      date = if ("date" %in% names(df)) suppressWarnings(max(as.Date(date), na.rm = TRUE)) else NA,
      .groups = "drop"
    )
}

# Mixed model with AR(1) correlation over weeks
fit_lme_ar1 <- function(df, outcome, covars, id_col = "external_id") {
  covars <- covars[covars %in% names(df)]
  terms <- c("week_f", "bw_kg", covars)
  terms <- terms[!is.na(terms) & nzchar(terms)]
  f <- as.formula(paste(outcome, "~", paste(terms, collapse = " + ")))
  rand_form <- as.formula(paste("~ 1 |", id_col))
  cor_form  <- as.formula(paste("~ week_num |", id_col))
  m <- nlme::lme(
    f,
    random = rand_form,
    correlation = corAR1(form = cor_form),
    data = df,
    na.action = na.omit
  )
  # Avoid downstream tools failing to evaluate symbols in the stored call
  m$call$random <- rand_form
  m$call$correlation <- nlme::corAR1(form = cor_form)
  m
}

# EMM plot helper (per-week marginal means with 95% CI)
emm_line <- function(model, title, color_fill) {
  em  <- as.data.frame(emmeans(model, ~ week_f))
  em$week_num <- as.numeric(as.character(em$week_f))
  base <- em$emmean[which.min(em$week_num)]
  ggplot(em, aes(week_num, emmean)) +
    geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lower.CL, ymax = upper.CL), alpha = 0.15, fill = color_fill) +
    geom_line(color = color_fill, linewidth = 0.9) +
    geom_point(color = color_fill, size = 1.8) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = base, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey40") +
    labs(x = "Week", y = "marginal mean (95% CI)", title = title) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
    theme(plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"))
}
```

## Data Load

```{r data-load}
path <- "data/CMJ_IMTP_RUGBY.xlsx"

# Raw
raw_demo <- read_excel(path, sheet = "Hoja 1")
raw_cmj  <- read_excel(path, sheet = "CMJ")
raw_imtp <- read_excel(path, sheet = "IMTP")

# Clean names
clean_demo <- clean_names(raw_demo)
clean_cmj  <- clean_names(raw_cmj)
clean_imtp <- clean_names(raw_imtp)

# Standardize key columns
Demo <- clean_demo %>%
  rename(
    external_id = externalid,
    first_name  = nombre,
    last_name   = apellido,
    sex         = sexo,
    dob         = fecha_nacimiento,
    weight_kg   = peso_kg,
    height_cm   = alturacm
  )

CMJ <- clean_cmj %>%
  rename(
    external_id = externalid,
    test_type   = test_type,
    bw_kg       = bw_kg
  )

IMTP <- clean_imtp %>%
  rename(
    external_id = externalid,
    test_type   = test_type,
    bw_kg       = bw_kg
  )

# Add week/date helpers
CMJ <- CMJ %>%
  mutate(
    week = as.character(week),
    week_num = as.numeric(week),
    week_f = factor(week_num),
    date = as.Date(date)
  )

IMTP <- IMTP %>%
  mutate(
    week = as.character(week),
    week_num = as.numeric(week),
    week_f = factor(week_num),
    date = as.Date(date)
  )

# Detect optional CMJ depth column (if present)
cmj_depth_col <- names(CMJ)[str_detect(names(CMJ), "depth")]
cmj_depth_col <- if (length(cmj_depth_col) > 0) cmj_depth_col[1] else NA_character_
cmj_covars <- c(cmj_depth_col)
cmj_covars <- cmj_covars[!is.na(cmj_covars)]

# Collapse to unique (athlete, week)
cmj_u  <- collapse_by_id_week(CMJ)
imtp_u <- collapse_by_id_week(IMTP)

# Ensure BW exists for IMTP
if (!"bw_kg" %in% names(imtp_u) && "bw_kg" %in% names(cmj_u)) {
  imtp_u <- imtp_u %>% left_join(cmj_u %>% select(external_id, week_num, bw_kg),
                                 by = c("external_id", "week_num"))
}

list(
  demo_rows = nrow(Demo),
  cmj_rows  = nrow(CMJ),
  imtp_rows = nrow(IMTP),
  cmj_depth = cmj_depth_col,
  cmj_u_rows = nrow(cmj_u),
  imtp_u_rows = nrow(imtp_u)
)
```

## Table 1: Demographics (gtsummary)

```{r table1}
Demo_tbl <- Demo %>%
  mutate(
    sex = factor(sex),
    age_years = as.numeric(difftime(Sys.Date(), as.Date(dob), units = "days")) / 365.25
  ) %>%
  select(external_id, sex, age_years, weight_kg, height_cm)

Demo_tbl %>%
  select(-external_id) %>%
  tbl_summary(
    by = sex,
    type = all_continuous() ~ "continuous2",
    statistic = all_continuous() ~ "{mean} ({sd})"
  ) %>%
  add_overall() %>%
  bold_labels()
```

## Dynamic Strength Index (DSI)

```{r dsi}
# CMJ peak force and IMTP peak force
cmj_pf_col <- if ("concentric_peak_force_n" %in% names(cmj_u)) "concentric_peak_force_n" else NA_character_
imtp_pf_col <- if ("peak_vertical_force_n" %in% names(imtp_u)) "peak_vertical_force_n" else NA_character_

DSI <- cmj_u %>%
  select(external_id, week_num, bw_kg, all_of(cmj_covars), all_of(cmj_pf_col)) %>%
  rename(cmj_peak_force_n = all_of(cmj_pf_col)) %>%
  inner_join(
    imtp_u %>%
      select(external_id, week_num, bw_kg, all_of(imtp_pf_col)) %>%
      rename(imtp_peak_force_n = all_of(imtp_pf_col)),
    by = c("external_id", "week_num"),
    suffix = c("_cmj", "_imtp")
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    bw_kg = ifelse(!is.na(bw_kg_cmj), bw_kg_cmj, bw_kg_imtp),
    week_f = factor(week_num),
    dsi = cmj_peak_force_n / imtp_peak_force_n
  ) %>%
  select(-bw_kg_cmj, -bw_kg_imtp)

DSI %>%
  summarise(
    rows = n(),
    athletes = n_distinct(external_id),
    dsi_mean = mean(dsi, na.rm = TRUE),
    dsi_sd = sd(dsi, na.rm = TRUE)
  )

# Mixed model for DSI
dsi_model <- NULL
if (nrow(DSI) > 4) {
  dsi_covars <- cmj_covars
  dsi_model <- fit_lme_ar1(DSI, "dsi", dsi_covars)
  dsi_effects <- broom.mixed::tidy(dsi_model, effects = "fixed", conf.int = TRUE)
  dsi_effects
}
```

## Temporal Dynamics (AR1 + EMM Panels)

```{r temporal-panels, fig.height=10, fig.width=11}
cmj_core_vars <- c(
  "jump_height_imp_mom_cm",
  "peak_power_w",
  "contraction_time_ms",
  "rsi_modified_m_s"
)
imtp_core_vars <- c(
  "peak_vertical_force_n",
  "absolute_impulse_100ms_n_s",
  "rfd_50ms_n_s"
)

cmj_core_vars <- cmj_core_vars[cmj_core_vars %in% names(cmj_u)]
imtp_core_vars <- imtp_core_vars[imtp_core_vars %in% names(imtp_u)]

cmj_labels <- c(
  jump_height_imp_mom_cm = "Jump Height (cm)",
  peak_power_w = "Peak Power (W)",
  contraction_time_ms = "Contraction Time (ms)",
  rsi_modified_m_s = "RSI Modified (m/s)"
)
imtp_labels <- c(
  peak_vertical_force_n = "Peak Force (N)",
  absolute_impulse_100ms_n_s = "Impulse 100 ms (N s)",
  rfd_50ms_n_s = "RFD 50 ms (N/s)"
)

# Fit AR(1) mixed models
cmj_models <- lapply(cmj_core_vars, function(v) fit_lme_ar1(cmj_u, v, cmj_covars))
names(cmj_models) <- cmj_core_vars

imtp_models <- lapply(imtp_core_vars, function(v) fit_lme_ar1(imtp_u, v, covars = character(0)))
names(imtp_models) <- imtp_core_vars

plots <- list()
for (v in cmj_core_vars) {
  plots[[v]] <- emm_line(cmj_models[[v]], cmj_labels[[v]], "#2E86AB")
}
for (v in imtp_core_vars) {
  plots[[v]] <- emm_line(imtp_models[[v]], imtp_labels[[v]], "#A23B72")
}

if (!is.null(dsi_model)) {
  plots[["dsi"]] <- emm_line(dsi_model, "Dynamic Strength Index", "#1D6F42")
}

panel_emm <- if (length(plots) > 0) wrap_plots(plots, ncol = 2) else ggplot() +
  labs(title = "Not enough data for temporal panels")

panel_emm
```

## Mixed Models Tables (sjPlot)

```{r mixed-model-tables}
cmj_models_list <- cmj_models[!vapply(cmj_models, is.null, logical(1))]
imtp_models_list <- imtp_models[!vapply(imtp_models, is.null, logical(1))]

all_models <- c(cmj_models_list, imtp_models_list)
all_labels <- c(
  unname(cmj_labels[names(cmj_models_list)]),
  unname(imtp_labels[names(imtp_models_list)])
)

if (!is.null(dsi_model)) {
  all_models <- c(all_models, list(dsi_model))
  all_labels <- c(all_labels, "Dynamic Strength Index")
}

if (length(all_models) > 0) {
  do.call(
    sjPlot::tab_model,
    c(
      unname(all_models),
      list(
        dv.labels = all_labels,
        show.ci = TRUE,
        show.p = TRUE,
        show.re.var = TRUE,
        show.icc = TRUE,
        show.r2 = TRUE
      )
    )
  )
}
```

## Central Figure (Major Findings)

```{r central-figure, fig.height=10, fig.width=11}
panel_emm
```
